title: Tightfault Revamp Edit Edit
description: An Edit of the Tightfault Revamp Edit
body:
An Edit for https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tightfault-revamp-edit

Pleas keep in mind that all the textures that karmette made aren’t under the MIT license. This applies to the netherite tools and armor.

You can use my textures and the original textures (I have the MIT license, the original texturepack doesn’t).

Textures I edited (you can use these):
- All diamond tools
- All iron tools
- All gold tools
- All stone tools
- All wood tools

I also edited the netherite tools, but you can’t use those.

This edit aims to improve consistency between the tools and swords. 

Includes leather armor. (the colors may be inaccurate)

Im very bad at making textures. 

I am allowed to redistribute this texturepack if I give credits, see:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tightfault-revamp-edit/comments


## Credits:

Tight (Original Creator)

https://youtu.be/fRDaP1aAPug

Juskebat (Made 1.12 version and recipe book texture)

https://youtu.be/0GrFMZFJvCQs

Karmette (Made the netherite tools and armor)

https://modrinth.com/user/karmette
